purpose: Stylesheet for the Live Preview tab (PreviewView.jsx). Styles the entire preview surface: .preview-view container (flex column, fills parent), .preview-toolbar (40px high, nav buttons + URL form + detect button), .preview-nav-btn (28x28 transparent buttons with hover/active/disabled states), .preview-url-form/.preview-url-input (monospace URL bar with focus ring and animated loading bar beneath), .preview-no-project-banner (amber warning when no project is set for inline editing), .preview-content (relative container for webview + overlays), .preview-webview (the embedded Electron webview with white background), .preview-loading-overlay (z-index 10 dim layer with .preview-spinner — 32px spinning border), .preview-error (z-index 15 full-cover error state with retry button), .preview-empty (centered empty-state with icon and prompt), .preview-detect-btn (dev-server detect with spinner), and .preview-edit-toast (z-index 20 bottom-center success/error toast with slide-in animation).
gotchas: All classes prefixed .preview-* — DO NOT add unprefixed selectors here, they would leak globally since this is concatenated with index.css at runtime.
Z-index local scale: .preview-loading-overlay=10, .preview-error=15, .preview-edit-toast=20. Values are local to .preview-content stacking context.
Hard-coded fallback color #6c5ce7 (used as --color-accent fallback) does NOT match index.css's actual --color-accent value (#9b7cf0). If --color-accent fails to load the visual will drift.
.preview-webview has hard-coded white background (#fff) — ensures embedded sites without their own background look right but breaks dark-mode previews briefly during load.
Animations (preview-loading-slide, preview-spin, preview-toast-in) are scoped by name but live in global keyframe space — renaming an existing global @keyframes 'preview-spin' could collide.
patterns: Heavy use of var(--token, fallback) pattern for graceful degradation.
Toolbar uses min-height + height + flex-shrink:0 to lock its size.
Loading bar absolutely positioned within URL form with translateX keyframe animation.

related: src/ui/preview/inject-overlay.js (the overlay injects its own scoped styles for highlighted-on-hover indicators)
